title: Everything You Need to Know About Crypto Payment Integration for Static Sites
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or other countries restricted by PayPal or other payment processors, selling digital products like ebooks, courses, or software can be a frustrating experience. You're blocked from receiving payments for your creations, which can lead to missed opportunities and financial losses. To break this cycle, you need a reliable crypto payment integration solution that works seamlessly with static sites, allowing you to receive payments in various cryptocurrencies and convert them to local currencies.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Crypto payment integration for static sites is a technology that enables digital creators to receive payments directly from their website visitors using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. This solution bypasses traditional payment processors like PayPal, allowing creators to access a wider market and faster payment processing. By leveraging this technology, creators can expand their customer base, increase sales, and enjoy faster payment settlements, all while minimizing the risk of payment hold-ups and chargebacks.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The crypto payment integration process involves using a frontend wallet integration tool like Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to generate a multi-chain QR code on your static site. When a customer scans the QR code, they can pay using their preferred cryptocurrency, which is then instantly verified and settled through the blockchain network. The payment is then converted to local currency using peer-to-peer exchange rates, ensuring that creators receive their funds promptly and without any intermediaries.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is specifically designed for digital creators who face restrictions or limitations when using traditional payment processors. Whether you're based in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or other countries with restrictive payment policies, this solution provides a reliable alternative for receiving payments in various cryptocurrencies and converting them to local currencies. By using this technology, creators can break free from the constraints of traditional payment systems and focus on building their business and customer relationships.
Crypto payment integration is the key to breaking free from traditional payment processor restrictions.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The key components of this technology include the Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) frontend wallet integration tool, which generates a multi-chain QR code, and the NOWPayments payment processor, which facilitates cryptocurrency transactions and conversions to local currencies. When combined with your static site, these components enable seamless cryptocurrency payments and fast payment settlements, making it easier for creators to receive payments and grow their business.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start using crypto payment integration for your static site, follow these steps: First, install the Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) plugin on your site. Next, configure the plugin to generate a multi-chain QR code. Then, integrate the NOWPayments payment processor to facilitate cryptocurrency transactions. Finally, test your payment flow to ensure seamless transactions and fast payment settlements. With these steps, you can unlock the full potential of your digital business and start receiving payments in various cryptocurrencies and local currencies.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
Receive payments in various cryptocurrencies and local currencies with seamless integration and fast payment settlements.

If you're looking to receive USDT payments for your digital products or convert Bitcoin to local currency, consider using Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to integrate cryptocurrency payments on your static site. This solution is perfect for creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and other countries restricted by traditional payment processors. Visit https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more about how to set up crypto payment integration on your site and start receiving payments in cryptocurrency.
Your Action Checklist

To start receiving payments in cryptocurrency, follow these concrete steps: Install the Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) plugin on your static site. Configure the plugin to generate a multi-chain QR code. Integrate the NOWPayments payment processor to facilitate cryptocurrency transactions.
